# AI Video Tools Directory
> Comprehensive directory of the best AI video creation tools, curated for creators worldwide. Browse 16+ tools across video generation, editing, AI avatars, animation, and all-in-one platforms with detailed reviews, pricing, and recommendations.

## What is this site?
AI Video Tools Directory (https://qinwei76.github.io/ai-video-tools-nav/) is a curated collection of the top AI video creation tools available in 2026. We provide in-depth reviews, feature comparisons, pricing information, and use-case recommendations to help creators choose the right AI video tools for their needs.

## Key Features
- Curated selection of 16+ top AI video tools
- Detailed 7-dimension reviews for each tool (features, pricing, pros/cons, use cases, ratings)
- 5 main categories: Video Generation, Video Editing, AI Avatar, Animation, All-in-One
- Real-time updates as new tools launch
- Free AI video prompt template packs available

## Tools Covered

### Video Generation
- **PixVerse** — AI-powered video generation with 4K upscale, text-to-video and image-to-video capabilities. Free tier available.
- **Runway Gen-4** — Professional-grade AI video generation with advanced creative controls. From $15/month.
- **Pika** — Creative AI video tool excelling in 3D/anime styles, social media content. From $10/month.
- **Luma Dream Machine** — Fast, cinematic AI video generation. From $9.99/month.
- **Kling AI** — Realistic human generation and natural motion, strong Chinese language support. From $10/month.
- **即梦AI (Jimeng AI)** — Powered by Seedance 2.0, cinematic storyboarding and subject transfer. Free tier available.

### Video Editing
- **CapCut** — Free video editor with AI features, 30+ language subtitles. Best for TikTok/social media.
- **Descript** — AI-powered video editing with transcription and text-based editing. From $24/month.

### AI Avatar / Digital Human
- **HeyGen** — AI avatar videos with lip-sync, translation, and personalized content. From $29/month.
- **Synthesia** — Professional AI avatar platform for business and training videos. From $29/month.
- **D-ID** — AI talking photo and digital avatar generation. From $5.90/month.

### Animation
- **Animaker** — DIY animation platform with AI-assisted character creation. Free tier available.
- **Vidu** — Top-tier physics simulation for game CG and complex visual effects. From $9.99/month.

### All-in-One Platforms
- **InVideo** — Complete video creation platform with AI script-to-video. From $25/month.
- **FlexClip** — Template-based video maker with AI features. Free tier available.
- **Pictory** — AI blog-to-video and script-to-video conversion. From $19/month.

## AI Video Prompt Template Pack
We offer a professional AI video prompt template pack (60+ prompts, 10 scenarios, bilingual Chinese/English) for ¥29.9.

## Contact & More Information
Visit our full directory at https://qinwei76.github.io/ai-video-tools-nav/ for detailed reviews, comparisons, and direct links to each tool.
